reason: All acceptance criteria verified. PrometheusMetrics with 8 metrics: 1 Histogram (response_duration_seconds with buckets), 6 Counters (requests_total, fcr_total, knowledge_hit_total, pii_masked_total, emotion_escalation_total, llm_tokens_total), 1 Gauge (escalation_queue_size). All registered on default REGISTRY. get_metrics() returns bytes in Prometheus text format. GET /metrics wired in app.py. Label validation raises ValueError on mismatch. All 18/18 tests pass. Coverage 100%.
